architectReview.evidence: Final architect review is clear: split control plane, runtime wrapper dispatch, action-scoped approvals, mediated pr.create/pr.merge writes, and refreshed docs/artifacts all align with the approved plan. Final blocker sweeps reported zero blockers.

executorQa.evidence: Targeted verification passed: bun run check:compose 176/176, bun run config/validate.ts 16/16, bun test 120 pass / 0 fail, bunx tsc --noEmit success, docker compose --env-file .env.example config --quiet success, and bun test qa/red-team.test.ts 25 pass / 0 fail.

artifactRefs.description: terminal transcript for compose-static, config-validate, full bun test, typecheck, and docker compose config
package-level test evidence covering state machine, loaders, runtime wrappers, and server integration through bun test
API-level control-event, webhook, dispatch, and approved-write integration evidence through glue/server.test.ts
adversarial QA report for approval, webhook, secret, broker, parser, and metric abuse cases
adversarial test transcript with 25 passing cases

contractCoverage.obligation: No host socket or workspace, internal-only runtime/control topology, allowlisted egress, restart, healthcheck, read_only/tmpfs/cap_drop hardening.

contractCoverage.contractRef: approved plan / config parity and approval stages
contractCoverage.obligation: Both runtimes keep the same provider/model/autonomy, five roles, approval-required pr_creator/merger stages, and env-ref secrets only.

contractCoverage.contractRef: approved plan / control-plane approved write execution
contractCoverage.obligation: Control plane executes pr.create and pr.merge only after action-scoped approval, with brokered rw token release and strict gating.

contractCoverage.contractRef: approved plan / runtime wrapper stage execution
contractCoverage.obligation: Non-write stages dispatch into the per-role runtime wrapper, which authenticates dispatch, validates runtime/role/stage, and materializes a stage artifact plus receipt before glue advances.

contractCoverage.contractRef: no GUI/browser surface in current repo scope
contractCoverage.obligation: GUI/browser evidence is intentionally out of scope for this backend/Discord orchestrator story.
contractCoverage.reason: The implemented system exposes CLI, API, package, and Discord surfaces only.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: bun run check:compose and docker compose --env-file .env.example config --quiet
bun test including runtimes/start.test.ts and glue/runtime-dispatch.ts integration coverage

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: Control-event, webhook, dispatch, and approved write API path
surfaceEvidence.invocation: bun test including glue/server.test.ts webhook/control-event/dispatch/live write cases

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: Strict merge gate / parser / metrics / adversarial policy checks
no GUI/browser surface in current repo scope
surfaceEvidence.reason: No GUI/browser surface exists in this orchestration repository.

adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Strict boolean checks reject the merge and do not allow bypass.

adversarialCases.scenario: POST approve/reject mutations without or with wrong x-control-event-secret.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Control-event mutations are rejected with 401 and workflow state is not changed.

adversarialCases.scenario: Attempt /dispatch release without matching approval or with wrong role/action.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Write token release is rejected unless the exact approved action/role is present; approved releases consume the approval.

adversarialCases.scenario: Load runtime and control secrets for read-only roles, write roles, and control services.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Read-only runtime roles never access rw token, control services receive only their scoped secrets, and write scope is released only through the mediated path.

adversarialCases.scenario: Inspect compose topology, mounted volumes, env refs, and allowlist entries for forbidden sockets, binds, or wildcard egress.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Static checks reject unsafe topology and only the intended allowlist and internal-only network model pass.

adversarialCases.scenario: Send invalid runtime/role/stage payloads or missing x-runtime-dispatch-secret to runtime /dispatch.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Runtime dispatch rejects bad auth/mismatched runtime-role-stage and only accepted payloads produce a work artifact plus receipt.

iteration.evidence: Blocking findings were resolved iteratively, then the full five-gate verification bundle and adversarial suite were rerun cleanly. Final blocker sweeps reported zero blockers and a final architect review returned CLEAR/APPROVE.
